engine.ladder_reasoning: The page argues a physical PRODUCT — 7 features, brass advantages, installation guide, durability claims plus testimonials as proof it works. No defined-expertise service (not trust), the product photos support a feature argument rather than being self-proving portfolio, and there is a full persuasive body rather than a bare ask.

goal.one_action: contact the shop via Line / phone (or visit) to inquire/buy faucets

structure.archetype_note: WordPress multi-page product-showcase catalog; prices shown but no cart — conversion is off-page contact via Line/phone/map.

mapped.observed_as: NAMLIN GOLD FAUCET - แหล่งรวม ก๊อกน้ำและอุปกรณ์ทองเหลืองแท้

unmapped.observed: Product grid pages (10-item catalog on /gold-home-applicances/ with ฿ prices, no cart)
unmapped.why_no_fit: sectionList has no product-catalog/listing section; closest are useCases/features which do not capture a priced product grid

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; all pages, CTAs, proof, commerce and nav captured cleanly.

gap_findings: Priced product-catalog grid (own goods, prices shown, no cart) has no canonical section id — repeatedly forced into features/useCases; a catalog/product-listing section is the recurring gap.
Line messaging is the primary contact channel (Thai market equivalent of WhatsApp) — mapped to call-WhatsApp mechanism, which fits.
